module.task_weapon_upgrade.description:
### Tips
            * Automatically upgrade weapons in the inventory.
            * Weapons will be sorted by level, prioritizing those that can be upgraded.
            * Ensure sufficient upgrade materials are available.
module.upgrade.log.发现空的强化槽_点击_号打开材料选择面板: Empty upgrade slot detected, clicking [+] to open material selection panel...
module.upgrade.log.武器升级流程达到最长执行时间_超时: Weapon upgrade process reached maximum execution time (timeout)
module.upgrade.log.武器等级已满_停止升级流程: Weapon level already maxed, stopping upgrade process
module.upgrade.log.经验不足_持续添加强化材料: EXP insufficient, continuing to add upgrade materials...
module.upgrade.log.触发_等级提升_点击空白处关闭弹窗: Level Up triggered, clicking blank area to close popup...
module.weapon_upgrade.description:
### Tips
            * Automatically upgrade weapons in the inventory.
            * Weapons will be sorted by level, prioritizing those that can be upgraded.
            * Ensure sufficient upgrade materials are available.
module.weapon_upgrade.title: Weapon Upgrade
